channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [VEL] Vaxfab Allots 1.31M Equity Shares at ₹21.02 via Warrant Conversion
item.description:
Vaxfab Enterprises Ltd's Board of Directors approved the allotment of 1,318,550 fully paid-up equity shares, each with a face value of ₹10, at a price of ₹21.02 per share. These shares were issued upon the conversion of warrants on a preferential basis to 11 investors. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased to ₹23,51,85,770, comprising 23,518,577 equity shares. The newly allotted shares will rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the company.

  • Board approved allotment of 1,318,550 equity shares.
  • Shares issued at ₹21.02 each upon warrant conversion.
  • Allotment made on a preferential basis to 11 investors.
  • Paid-up equity capital increased to ₹23.52 crore.
  • New shares rank pari-passu with existing equity shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vaxfab Enterprises Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title:
[VEL] Vaxfab Allots 1.31M Equity Shares at
₹21.02 via Warrant Conversion
item.description:
Vaxfab Enterprises Ltd. announced the allotment of 1,318,550 fully paid-up equity shares, each with a face value of ₹10, at a price of ₹21.02. These shares were issued upon the conversion of warrants on a preferential basis to 11 investors. This corporate action has increased the company's paid-up equity share capital to ₹23,51,85,770, comprising 23,518,577 equity shares. The newly allotted shares will rank pari-passu with existing equity shares.

  • 1,318,550 equity shares allotted upon warrant conversion.
  • Shares issued at ₹21.02 per share on a preferential basis.
  • Paid-up capital increased to ₹23.51 crore post-allotment.
  • Allotment made to 11 investors.
  • New shares rank pari-passu with existing equity shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vaxfab Enterprises Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [NETWEB] Netweb Technologies Board Meeting on May 2, 2026 for Results & Dividend
item.description:
Netweb Technologies India Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 2, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the recommendation of a final dividend, if any. The trading window has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the conclusion of the board meeting, as per insider trading regulations.

  • Board meeting on May 2, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of final dividend for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Netweb Technologies India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ADCINDIA] Amphenol Corp Acquires ADC India Shares via Open Offer
item.description:
Amphenol Corporation acquired shares of ADC India Communications Ltd through an open offer, as per Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition resulted in Amphenol holding 14 shares, representing 0.00% of the total share/voting capital. Amphenol now belongs to the Promoter Group due to its 100% stake in CommScope Technologies LLC. The equity share capital of ADC India remains at INR 4,60,00,000, consisting of 46,00,000 equity shares of INR 10 each.

  • Amphenol Corp acquires ADC India shares via open offer under SEBI regulations.
  • Acquisition results in Amphenol holding 14 shares (0.00% of total share capital).
  • Amphenol now part of Promoter Group via CommScope Technologies LLC stake.
  • ADC India's equity share capital remains unchanged at INR 4,60,00,000.
  • The acquisition was completed on April 22, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADC India Communications Limited-$ | Category: Open Offer

item.title: [BHAGIL] Bhageria Industries Board Meeting on May 2, 2026
item.description:
Bhageria Industries Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 2, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results (standalone & consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a final dividend, if any, on equity shares for FY26, subject to shareholder approval at the Annual General Meeting. The trading window has been closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the financial results are declared.

  • Board to consider audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Final dividend for FY26 to be considered and recommended.
  • Director’s Report will be considered in the meeting.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bhageria Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JTLIND] JTL Defence Gets BSE Trading Approval for 1.05 Cr Shares
item.description:
JTL Industries Ltd's subsidiary, JTL Defence Limited (formerly RCI Industries & Technologies Limited), has received trading approval from the BSE for 1,05,26,315 equity shares of ₹10 each. The shares will be available for trading from April 27, 2026, under the XT Group in the Trade-to-Trade segment. This includes shares allotted post capital reduction and on a preferential basis, following the approval of a resolution plan under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.

  • JTL Defence receives BSE trading approval for 1,05,26,315 equity shares.
  • Trading commences on April 27, 2026, under XT Group.
  • Shares include those allotted post-capital reduction and on preferential basis.
  • Resolution plan approved by NCLT, New Delhi on October 9, 2025.
  • Existing equity share capital of promoters and others was cancelled.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JTL Industries Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [WALCHANNAG] Walchandnagar Clarifies on Price Movement
item.description:
Walchandnagar Industries Ltd. responded to a BSE query regarding significant price movement in its stock. The company stated it has disclosed all material information as per SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. It highlighted the positive impact of the SHANTI Bill, 2025 and India's First prototype Fast Breeder Reactor (PFBR) attaining criticality on the nuclear energy sector, from which the company expects to benefit. Walchandnagar Industries maintains that the price movement is market-driven and that there is no undisclosed price-sensitive information.

  • Walchandnagar Industries responded to exchange query on stock price movement.
  • Company cites policy reforms in nuclear energy sector as a potential positive factor.
  • SHANTI Bill, 2025 and PFBR criticality are expected to benefit the sector.
  • Company affirms compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
  • Walchandnagar states no undisclosed price-sensitive information exists.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WALCHANDNAGAR INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [AAYUSH] Aayush Wellness Launches Liver Detox Tablets
item.description:
Aayush Wellness Limited has launched "Liver Detox Tablets," a herbal formulation designed to support liver health and address lifestyle-related liver disorders. This launch expands the company's preventive healthcare portfolio, aligning with its focus on condition-led wellness categories. The tablets combine Milk Thistle, N-Acetyl Cysteine (NAC), Alpha Lipoic Acid, and L-Glutamine. This launch reflects Aayush Wellness's strategy to build a diversified preventive wellness portfolio around repeat-use categories. India’s nutraceutical market is estimated at $18 billion.

  • Aayush Wellness launches Liver Detox Tablets to address growing liver health concerns.
  • The tablets contain Milk Thistle, NAC, Alpha Lipoic Acid, and L-Glutamine.
  • The launch aligns with Aayush Wellness's strategy to expand its preventive healthcare portfolio.
  • India's nutraceutical market is estimated at $18 billion with double-digit growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aayush Food and Herbs Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [RAINBOW] Rainbow Children's: White Oak Capital's Holding Revised to 2.80%
item.description:
White Oak Capital Management Consultants LLP reported a change in shareholding of Rainbow Children's Medicare Ltd. Following an acquisition of 20,38,948 shares (2.01%), their holding decreased to 28,45,567 shares, representing 2.80% of the total share/voting capital. The disclosure is under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • White Oak Capital's shareholding in Rainbow Children's Medicare Ltd decreased to 2.80%.
  • Acquired 20,38,948 shares, representing 2.01% of the company.
  • The disclosure is made under SEBI's Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers Regulations.
  • Revised threshold in WO Capital post transfer of PMS business stood at 4.81%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rainbow Children's Medicare Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [MAHAANF] Nautilus Private Capital acquires 8.57% stake in Lake Shore Realty
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Nautilus Private Capital Ltd has disclosed the acquisition of 300,000 equity shares in Lake Shore Realty Ltd, representing an 8.5697% stake in the target company. The acquisition was carried out through the open market. Prior to this transaction, Nautilus Private Capital Ltd held no shares in Lake Shore Realty Ltd. Post-acquisition, their total holding stands at 8.5697% of the company's equity share capital. Lake Shore Realty Ltd's shares are listed on both BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

  • Nautilus Private Capital Ltd acquired 300,000 equity shares.
  • The acquisition represents an 8.5697% stake in Lake Shore Realty Ltd.
  • The shares were acquired via the open market.
  • Nautilus Private Capital Ltd held no shares before this acquisition.
  • Lake Shore Realty Ltd's total equity capital is 35,00,700 shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAHAAN FOODS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions
